event: Church of St. Nicholas at the Malaya Neva River
description: A watercolor painting of a Russian Orthodox church with multiple ornate towers topped by green onion domes and gold crosses. The white stone facade features arched windows, decorative stonework, and a covered entrance porch. The church rises against a partly cloudy blue sky. In the foreground, small figures of pedestrians and a horse-drawn carriage provide scale along a street or embankment. Trees and other buildings are visible at the sides. The style is architectural and documentary, capturing the building's detailed ornamentation.

_meta.title: The church of St Nicholas at the Malaya Neva river
